name: FUB Social Router
_notes: FUB webhook ID 52 (dealsUpdated) routes to this endpoint.
Auth: URL token from process.env.FUB_SOCIAL_WEBHOOK_TOKEN + timingSafeEqual.
Requires n8n container restart to activate env var: sudo docker stop n8n && sudo docker start n8n
Token also in H:\AI\Secrets\.env.master.private as FUB_SOCIAL_WEBHOOK_TOKEN.
Draft tokens expire after 24 hours (AND created_at > now() - interval '24 hours').
All FUB fields sanitized before LLM interpolation (length caps + char allowlist).
OpenRouter key: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY — same env section as FUB token.

messages.content: You write real estate social media posts for The Anchor Group in Palm Coast, Florida. Brand: Dolphins Not Sharks. Fair Housing compliant: no schools, crime, or neighborhood demographics. Posts 50-100 words. End with: — The Anchor Group

=Write 3 Under Contract posts.
Property: {{$json.address}}, {{$json.city}}, FL
Price: ${{$json.price}} | {{$json.beds}} bed / {{$json.baths}} bath
Agent: {{$json.agent}}

Write exactly 3 variations labeled COASTAL:, FAMILY:, and LUXURY: on separate lines. Each 50-100 words. Celebrate the milestone warmly.

You write real estate social media posts for The Anchor Group in Palm Coast, Florida. Brand: Dolphins Not Sharks. Fair Housing compliant. SOLD posts celebrate the transaction. 50-120 words. End with: — The Anchor Group

=Write 2 SOLD post variations.
Property: {{$json.address}}, {{$json.city}}, FL
Sale Price: ${{$json.price}} | {{$json.beds}} bed / {{$json.baths}} bath
Agent: {{$json.agent}}

Write exactly 2 variations labeled CELEBRATORY: and GRATEFUL: on separate lines. Each 50-120 words.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO nightshift.social_drafts (id, workflow, address, tone, content, agent_email) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)

parameters.subject: =Under Contract post ready — {{$json.address[0]}}
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{$json.agent[0]}},

3 post options ready for {{$json.address[0]}}, FL. Click to preview — nothing posts until you confirm.

{{$json.tone.map((tone,i)=>'' + tone + '').join(' ')}}

— Anchor Group AI | Nothing posts until you confirm.

parameters.subject: =SOLD! Post ready — {{$json.address[0]}}
parameters.html:
=

Congrats {{$json.agent[0]}}! 2 SOLD post options for {{$json.address[0]}}, FL. Click to preview — nothing posts until you confirm.

{{$json.tone.map((tone,i)=>'' + tone + '').join(' ')}}

— Anchor Group AI | Nothing posts until you confirm.

parameters.query: SELECT id, tone, content, consumed FROM nightshift.social_drafts WHERE id = $1
UPDATE nightshift.social_drafts SET consumed=true,consumed_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND consumed=false AND created_at > now() - interval '24 hours' RETURNING id,content,tone

parameters.responseBody:
✓ Published!

Under Contract post is live on Facebook.

parameters.query: SELECT id, tone, content, consumed FROM nightshift.social_drafts WHERE id = $1
UPDATE nightshift.social_drafts SET consumed=true,consumed_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND consumed=false AND created_at > now() - interval '24 hours' RETURNING id,content,tone

parameters.responseBody:
✓ Published!

SOLD post is live on Facebook.
